endpoint.label: Seedance 2
endpoint.summary: Submit Seedance 2 and Seedance 2 Fast video jobs through APIDot's unified async generation endpoint.
endpoint.about: Seedance 2 and `seedance-2-fast` share the same APIDot submit contract. Send the model id, optional callback_url, and model-specific parameters inside `input`, then retrieve the final result through the shared task status endpoint or webhook callbacks.
bestPractices: Use `seedance-2-fast` for iteration, then move to `seedance-2` when you need the highest final quality or 1080p output.
Be explicit about camera motion, pacing, subject continuity, and audio intent in the prompt.
Do not mix `image_urls` with any `reference_*_urls` fields in the same request.

faq.question: Can I switch between Seedance 2 variants without changing the endpoint?
faq.answer: Yes. Change only the `model` field between `seedance-2` and `seedance-2-fast`. The submit endpoint and the surrounding async workflow remain the same.

faq.question: How do first/last frame mode and reference mode differ?
faq.answer: Use `input.image_urls` for first/last frame control with up to two images. Use `reference_image_urls`, `reference_video_urls`, or `reference_audio_urls` for multimodal reference mode. These two approaches cannot be mixed in one request.

request.name: callback_url
request.description: Optional webhook callback URL for terminal task updates.

request.name: input.prompt
request.description: Primary generation prompt describing scene, motion, pacing, and style.

request.name: input.duration
request.description: Video duration in seconds. Current APIDot support is integer values from 4 through 15.

request.name: input.generate_audio
request.description: Whether to generate synchronized audio together with the video.

request.name: input.image_urls
request.description: Optional first and last frame images. Use up to 2 URLs only.

request.name: input.reference_image_urls
request.description: Optional reference image URLs for multimodal reference-to-video mode.

request.name: input.reference_video_urls
request.description: Optional reference video URLs for multimodal reference-to-video mode.

request.name: input.reference_audio_urls
request.description: Optional reference audio URLs for multimodal reference-to-video mode.

response.name: code
response.description: HTTP-style status code. Successful submits return `200`.

response.name: data.task_id
response.description: Async task identifier returned immediately after submission.

errors.name: invalid_request
errors.description: Missing fields, unsupported parameter combinations, or invalid reference input combinations.

errors.name: authentication_error
errors.description: Missing, expired, or invalid Bearer API key.

errors.name: insufficient_credits
errors.description: The current prepaid balance cannot cover the video job.

errors.name: rate_limited
errors.description: Submission rate is temporarily above the current allowed limit.

sample.curl:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.apidot.ai/api/generate/submit \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <APIDOT_API_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "model": "seedance-2",
  "callback_url": "https://your-domain.com/callback",
  "input": {
    "prompt": "A slow dolly-in on a ceramic cup of espresso, morning light",
    "duration": 5,
    "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
    "resolution": "720p",
    "generate_audio": true
  }
}
'
sample.python:
import os
from apidot import APIDot

client = APIDot(api_key=os.environ["APIDOT_API_KEY"])

request = {
    "model": "seedance-2",
    "callback_url": "https://your-domain.com/callback",
    "input": {
        "prompt": "A slow dolly-in on a ceramic cup of espresso, morning light",
        "duration": 5,
        "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
        "resolution": "720p",
        "generate_audio": True
    }
}

response = client.generate(
    endpoint="/api/generate/submit",
    **request
)

input.prompt: A slow dolly-in on a ceramic cup of espresso, morning light
A handheld close-up of rain on a taxi window in neon city light
A slow dolly-in on a ceramic cup of espresso, morning light
